description_long: This is a rectangular table with a dark, rich wood grain tabletop and four sturdy, straight black metal legs. The tabletop has a smooth, even surface with a subtle wood texture, giving it a modern yet classic appearance. The legs are positioned at each corner, providing stable support and a minimalist aesthetic. There are no visible drawers, handles, or decorative embellishments, emphasizing its functional design. The table's proportions suggest it is suitable for dining, working, or communal use in urban environments such as parks, cafes, or public plazas. Its materials and construction indicate durability for frequent use.
description: A modern rectangular table with a dark wood grain top and four black metal legs, featuring a smooth, minimalist design. Ideal for urban settings, it is sturdy and functional.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the dark wood tabletop and two black metal legs.
description_view_1: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, displaying the tabletop and two legs with no visible features on the sides.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the depth of the tabletop and the straight alignment of the legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the previous side, with the same tabletop depth and leg placement.
